profile.title: Senior Software Engineer
profile.overview: Backend developer with 8 years experience building distributed systems.

workExperiences.description: Built payment processing pipelines handling 10M transactions per day. Led team of 5 engineers.
Developed file sync engine in Python. Reduced sync latency by 40%.

global_preferences: Always write in British English. Use 'analyse' not 'analyze', 'organisation' not 'organization'.
query: Backend engineer CV — verify British English spelling throughout

profile.title: Product Designer
profile.overview: UX/UI designer specialising in SaaS product design.

workExperiences.description: Redesigned onboarding flow increasing activation rate by 22%. Managed design system with 200+ components.
Led redesign of collaboration features. Conducted 50+ user interviews.

global_preferences: Keep the professional summary to exactly two sentences. Do not use bullet points anywhere.
query: Product designer CV — verify two-sentence summary and no bullet points

profile.title: Data Scientist
profile.overview: ML engineer with focus on NLP and recommendation systems.

workExperiences.description: Built recommendation models serving 400M users. Improved click-through rate by 18% using transformer-based models.
Published 2 papers on reinforcement learning. Implemented RLHF pipeline.

message: targeting ML lead roles at AI startups
global_preferences: Use first-person active voice throughout (e.g. 'I built' not 'Built'). Quantify every achievement with a metric.
query: ML scientist CV — verify first-person active voice and quantified achievements

profile.title: Frontend Developer
profile.overview: React developer with 4 years of product experience.

workExperiences.description: Built consumer-facing React apps used by 5M daily active users. Reduced bundle size by 35%.
Implemented UI components and fixed accessibility issues.

global_preferences: Write in a concise, direct style. Each work experience description must be a single sentence of no more than 25 words.
query: Frontend developer CV — verify concise single-sentence work descriptions under 25 words

profile.title: Investment Banker
profile.overview: Finance professional with 10 years in M&A advisory.

workExperiences.description: Led M&A deals worth $2B+. Built financial models and managed client relationships.
Supported deal execution and due diligence for cross-border transactions.

message: transitioning to Product Manager at a fintech startup
global_preferences: Avoid all financial jargon. Write for a tech audience unfamiliar with investment banking terminology.
query: Finance-to-PM career change CV — verify absence of finance jargon and tech-friendly language
